name: Scott's Vintage Film HI
description: Today, we have Scott’s Vintage Film, a color profile that features pastel pink midtones, hints of teal in the highlights, warm shadows, and an overall faded aesthetic. There is also a HI version that has a bit more contrast and brighter highlights for a punchier look with the same tones (better for overcast days).
author: Scott Tucker
whiteBalance: Cloudy or Shade during the day, but dial it back to about 6700K if you feel it’s too warm. Either Cloudy or Shady will make sunset and blue hour photos really pop.
activeDLighting: Normal, but will move to High if an extremely high contrast scene
